_doc: Deterministic generation parameters for the simplify stage. Kept in config (not code) per the tuning-in-data principle. Palette keys must exist in the client art/palette.ts.

simplify._merge_doc: Two footprints fuse into one collider when their boxes (grown by this margin) overlap — i.e. they share or nearly share a wall. Old-town terraces collapse from N boxes to 1, which is how 578 buildings come under the 350-collider budget (ADR-018).

camel._note: lanes are short ENTRY corridors into the play area, not full crossings. child_exclusion_m mirrors shared/tuning.json camel_child_exclusion_m (ADR-019).

beer._note: a searching player finds beer in <=45 s (01 §3.1) -> a large find-radius; capped so a player NOT looking passes 2-3 without noticing (sparse, not blanketed).
